description: Approve or reject a pending join request. Requires auth (owner or admin).

main.description: Resolve a pending join request by approving or rejecting it.

requestId.description: The ID of the join request to resolve.

action.description: The action to take: approve or reject.

status.description: The resolved status: approved or rejected.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: Only the community owner or an admin can resolve join requests.

errors.name: AlreadyResolved
errors.description: The join request has already been approved or rejected.
